examples: A Siva Linga stands amid the ornate walls of the Angkor Wat temple in Cambodia.
This is Linga people's ancient funeral songs. Linga people is a part of Tujia ethnic group which inhabit in the hinterland of Wuling mountain.
To start exploring the ruins, begin with the Ganesha temple, then work counter clockwise to the Krishna temple and the Badava Linga -- an emblem of the Hindu deity Shiva.
